rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range bounds in type contracts
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible variables or features
Component implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for constants and equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;`
Constants are declared with `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
